address.address1: 'Jalan Soekarno - Hatta, Kebet, Bebesen' 'Jalan Soekarno - Hatta, , Kebet, Bebesen, Kabupaten Aceh Tengah'

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.responderName: Hotel Belangi Syariah Takengon Mitra RedDoorz
comments.reviewComments: Hotelnya bagus, strategis ditengah  takengon, cuman harus bawa handuk sendiri karena tidak disediakan , tvtidak bisa digunakan, untuk ruangan cukup bersih dan value for money lah buat yg ingin berkunjung kesini.

comments.reviewComments: There is no wardrobe in the hotel room. It is very cramped for two people.
